text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
232 
RSN_SRVC_CD 
LABEL: 
Reason for Service Code 
DESCRIPTION: Explains whether the pharmacist filled the prescription, filled part of the prescription, etc. 
This is the value reported in the Reason for Service Code field of the NCPDP claim form. 
SHORT NAME: RSN_SRVC_CD 
LONG NAME: RSN_SRVC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX line
